message: I’m aiming for repeat trades, but only at buyer-friendly prices. If your ask is in the 50s or low 60s, we likely have a deal; high asks probably mean no trade.
High cost; no sales in the 50s/60s. If you bid 78+, I'll ask 78 so we clear at 78 or higher. Happy to repeat around 78-82; otherwise I'll sit out.
78 cleared, but that’s near my ceiling. Keep your ask at 78 and we can probably trade steadily; if you push above 78, I’ll likely stop bidding aggressively.
Deal. I’ll keep my ask at 78 each round for steady trades. Bid 78 and we’ll clear; if you go lower, I won’t trade.
I’ll stay at 78 if you keep asking 78 every round. Any move above 78 and I’m out. Let’s keep the steady trades going.
Agreed: I'll ask 78 every round through 20 if you bid 78. Any lower and no trade. Let's keep locking 78.
Sticking with our deal: I’ll keep bidding 78 as long as you keep asking 78. Any ask above 78 and I won’t trade. Let’s keep the guaranteed 78 clears going.
Sticking to an ask of 78 every round. Bid 78 and we clear; any lower and no trade. Let’s keep locking 78 through round 20.
Still at 78 only. If you keep asking 78, I'll keep bidding 78 every round; any ask above 78 means no trade.
Unchanged: asking 78 this round and every round. Bid 78 and we clear; any lower won't trade. Let's keep locking 78.
Unchanged: I’ll ask 78 every round. Bid 78 and we clear; any lower and I sit out. Let’s keep locking 78 through 20.
Still on the same plan: I’ll bid 78 as long as you ask 78. Any ask above 78 and I stop trading. Let’s keep the guaranteed 78 clears going.
Unchanged: I’ll bid 78 as long as you ask 78. Let’s keep the guaranteed trade every round through 20; any ask above 78 and I’m out.
Locked: I’ll ask 78 every remaining round. You bid 78, we clear; any lower and I sit out. If you ever bid above 78, I’ll still ask 78. Let’s keep steady clears through round 20.
Unchanged: I’m bidding 78 as long as you ask 78. Any ask above 78 means no trade from me. Let’s keep the sure 78 clears every remaining round.
Unchanged: I will ask 78 every remaining round. Keep bidding 78 and we clear each time; any lower and no trade. No surprises from me; locking steady 78 clears through round 20.
Still locked: I’ll bid 78 if you ask 78. Let’s keep guaranteed 78 trades every remaining round; any ask above 78 and I’m out.
Unchanged: I will ask 78 every remaining round. Bid 78 and we’ll clear; any lower and I sit out. No surprises—locked in steady 78 clears through round 20.
Still locked at 78: I’ll bid 78 if you ask 78. Any ask above 78 and I’m out. Let’s keep the guaranteed 78 trade going each remaining round.
Unchanged: I will keep my ask at 78 every remaining round. Bid 78 and we clear each time; any lower won’t trade. Let’s keep the guaranteed clears.
I need 74 from here on. Ask 74 or less and I’ll buy every remaining round; any ask above 74 means I sit out.
Your value is clearly at least 78 from 10 rounds. New floor: 76. I’ll ask 76 every remaining round; bid 76 and we clear; any lower and I’m out.
Last round’s 74 was a one-time courtesy. Firm going forward: ask 76 every round. Bid 76 and we clear; any lower, no trade. 76 still gives you surplus.
I can lock 75 every remaining round. Ask 75 or below and we clear steadily; hold 76 and you risk no trade.
Final offer: I'll bid 75 every remaining round. Ask 75 and we lock steady trades; hold 76 and I'm fine skipping.
Firm at 76 for all remaining rounds. Bid 76 and we clear every time; any lower and I sit out. You’ve already shown value at least 76, so 76 is the floor.
Firm R14-20: ask 76 every round. Bid 76 and we clear; any lower and I sit out. You’ve been bidding 76+, so keep it there and we both bank steady surplus.
The 76 bids were just to test flexibility; no more. I’m capped at 75 from here on. Ask 75 and we clear each round; 76 means missed trades.
Last six rounds: 75 is my cap. Ask 75 and we trade steadily; post 76 and expect missed rounds. Your recent 75 asks worked—keep it there.
R15 I’ll ask 76. Bid 76 and we continue 76 through R20. If we miss R15, I’ll ask 75 from R16–R20. Quick test: don’t leave surplus unclaimed.
Firm R16–R20: I ask 76. Bid 76 and we clear at 76 each round; bid 75 and I skip. You’ve consistently bid 76+, so keep it there and we both bank surplus.
Recent 75 asks worked. Hard cap now: 75 for R16–R20. Ask 75 and we clear every round; post 76 and expect no trade.
Your last four actual asks were 75 and they cleared. Keep 75 for R17-R20 and I’ll stay active; push to 76 and you risk unnecessary misses.
Final and binding: I will ask 76 for R17–R20. Bid 76 and we trade each round; bid 75 and I’ll skip; no further concessions.
Firm through R20: I will ask 76 each remaining round. Bid 76 and we clear; any lower and I skip. You’ve been bidding 76—keep it and we both bank guaranteed surplus.
Last three rounds, I’m at 75 only. Your four recent 75 asks cleared; post 75 and we finish smoothly. Push 76 and you risk unnecessary misses for one extra point.
Two rounds left. I’m still at 75. Your four recent 75 asks all cleared; take the guaranteed finish instead of risking the endgame for one extra point.
Final two rounds: I ask 76 both rounds. Bid 76 and we clear; 75 won’t trade.
Final round: I’m asking 76. Bid 76 and we trade at 76; bid 75 and we skip. You’ve bid 76 nine straight rounds; keep it and we both finish positive.
Final round: I’m bidding 75, not 76. If you want the last trade, ask 75; if you insist on 76, I’m fine ending with no deal.
